creator: 2khramtsov@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to parv from comment #3)

> Data corruption is being reported on -CURRENT@ mailing list
dev-commits-src-all@ also has reports mixed in with rants in the related thread:

git: 2a58b312b62f - main - zfs: merge openzfs/zfs@431083f75
https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/dev-commits-src-all/2023-April/024838.html

Reports of issues would be better tracked in Bugzilla with reproducers and without unrelated noise. Moreover, mailing lists are not designed for bug tracking, unlike Bugzilla.
